summary: Completed testing of 8 requested features for Sr-Renovation.fr. All features working correctly: Form persistence, dark mode global, sorting on clients/quotes, enriched diagnostic, invoice payment status, catalog empty descriptions, backend PATCH invoice payment endpoint.

test_1_form_persistence.details: Filled work_location='123 Test Address for Persistence' and added service. Navigated to dashboard and back to /quotes/new. Data restored correctly. Toast 'Brouillon restauré' appears (may disappear quickly).

test_2_dark_mode_global.details: Dark mode toggle on dashboard works. Mode persists across ALL pages: /clients, /quotes, /catalog, /invoices. Background turns dark (#0f172a), text turns light, cards have proper dark backgrounds.

test_3_sort_clients.details: Sort button on /clients shows 'Récents' initially. Clicking toggles to 'A→Z' (alphabetical). Works correctly.

test_4_sort_quotes.details: Sort button on /quotes shows 'Récents' initially. Clicking toggles to 'A→Z'. Works correctly.

test_5_enriched_diagnostic.details: On /quotes/new, Diagnostic visuel section contains all enriched groups: (a) Gouttières: Obstruées, Encrassées, Corrosion/Rouille, Déformées, Décollées, Descente EP. (b) PC tôle: Rouille, Perforé, Joint défaillant. (c) Façade: Fissures, Mousses/traces. All checkboxes have data-testid attributes.

test_6_invoice_payment_status.details: On /invoices list: 'Payée' button (green) appears next to pending invoices. Clicking calls PATCH /api/invoices/{id}/payment?payment_status=paid. After marking paid: (a) badge changes to 'Payée' (green), (b) 'Payée intégralement' text shows instead of 'Reste: X€', (c) button changes to 'Annuler' to revert. Toast 'Facture marquée comme payée' confirms action.

test_7_catalog_empty_descriptions.details: Verified via API: all 22 catalog items have empty descriptions (length=0). Confirmed in UI - catalog shows service names and prices but no description text.

test_8_backend_patch_invoice.details: PATCH /api/invoices/{id}/payment?payment_status=paid tested via pytest. Returns {status: 'success', payment_status: 'paid'}. Updates acompte_paid to total_net and reste_a_payer to 0. Revert to pending (payment_status=pending) also works.

critical_code_review_comments: eslint warning in QuoteForm.js line 251 - missing dependency 'initialFormState.diagnostic' in useEffect. Non-blocking.
HTML hydration warnings from Emergent visual editor spans wrapping elements - non-functional impact.
Form persistence saves to localStorage immediately on every change which may cause performance issues with very large forms.
seed_data_creation: Created test clients and invoices during pytest - prefixed with TEST_
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 features tested and working: (1) Form persistence stores draft in localStorage key 'sr-quote-draft', restored on mount with toast. (2) Dark mode uses ThemeContext, adds 'dark' class to html element, persists via localStorage 'sr-dark-mode'. (3-4) Sorting on clients/quotes/invoices uses sortMode state with 'recent'/'alpha' toggle. (5) Enriched diagnostic has all Gouttières, PC tôle, Façade fields in QuoteForm.js diagnosticGroups. (6) Invoice payment status uses PATCH /api/invoices/{id}/payment endpoint, UI shows Payée/Annuler buttons. (7) Catalog descriptions confirmed empty. Backend tests in test_sr_renovation_api_v3.py.
